name: Manipal University Jaipur (MUJ) Online
accreditation: UGC, NAAC A+, WES, NIRF 58th, AICTE

usps: Legacy from 2011, NAAC A+ & NIRF 58th Ranked
Global Networking and access to extensive Alumni base
Real world case studies embedded in syllabus
Attractive Scholarships: Divyang, Disabled, Govt Employee, Merit (>80%)
Student can avail coupon discount on weekdays (Tuesday, Thursday & Saturday) on semester fee
10% discount on Overall fees and 5% discount on Annual payment, without discount coupon
Counsellor should NOT Register the Student by collecting ₹500. Block amount should be minimum ₹5000
Discounts are based on the opted fee structure (overall/semester/annual)
Counselors CAN generate semester weekend coupons from LSQ itself
Free access to paid Coursera content for UG & PG
Attempt 3 examinations in one day (first-come slot prioritization)
extendedDetails.payment: Registration: ₹500 | Block Amount: ₹5000. Loans: FIBE, Propelled, Greyquest, TCPL. UG no cost EMI on full fee. PG no cost EMI on sem and annual fee (If PG student wants 0 cost EMI on full fee, discount will not be applicable). No cost EMI is applicable on Debit card of HDFC Bank only.
extendedDetails.leadLocking: Auto Lock on LSQ | LSQ = MUJ

programs.name: BBA
programs.eligibility: 10+2 from a recognized board or an equivalent 3-year diploma. Minimum 50% aggregate (45% for reserved categories).
programs.about: A prestigious UGC-entitled Online Bachelor of Business Administration from Manipal University Jaipur. Designed for future executives and entrepreneurs, this program delivers a foundation in global business management, coupled with real-world case studies and immersive digital learning experiences via free Coursera access.
programs.careerScope: Graduate with the robust analytical and leadership skills required to excel in contemporary corporate roles. Placements heavily target positions like Business Analyst, Marketing Executive, HR Specialist, Operations Manager, and Financial Planner across global MNCs and startups.
programs.paymentDetails:
🔥 Top Ranked Online BBA Program!

• Semester Fee: ₹25,000 ₹22,500
• Total Program Fee: ₹1,50,000 ₹1,35,000

Exam Fee: ₹0 (Included)
Ultra-flexible No-Cost EMIs starting as low as ₹3,750/month (for 36 Months) to comfortably finance your degree.
programs.certifications: Integrated direct access to premium Coursera learning modules natively mapping globally recognized certifications directly into your academic transcript.
usps: Fully UGC-entitled degree possessing the exact same value as an on-campus BBA
100% Online delivery designed explicitly for working professionals
Unlimited access to premium certifications on Coursera
Dedicated placement counseling and live mock interviews
Seamless No-Cost EMI integrations with Eduvanz/Liquid Loans at ₹3,750/mo

Enhanced by Google Cloud computing labs and comprehensive programming modules, it's designed to build highly competent full-stack developers and cloud architects.
programs.careerScope: The global tech industry eagerly absorbs BCA graduates from recognized universities. Unlock high-paying opportunities as Cloud Developers, Software Engineers, Systems Analysts, Data Analysts, and Network Administrators in top-tier tech firms.

programs.name: BCOM
programs.eligibility: 10+2 from a recognized board or an equivalent 3-year diploma. Minimum 50% aggregate (45% for reserved categories).
programs.about: Manipal's UGC-entitled Online BCom is a powerfully tailored commerce degree focusing on modern accounting, global finance, corporate taxation, and business laws. Delivered on a cutting-edge platform, it readies candidates for financial excellence in any corporate ecosystem.
programs.careerScope: Commerce graduates dictate the essential financial health of every industry. Career tracks span into roles like Financial Analyst, Tax Consultant, Operations Lead, Auditor, and corporate Accountant in prominent BFSI sectors.
programs.paymentDetails:
🔥 Highly Accessible Online Commerce Degree!

• Semester Fee: ₹18,000 ₹16,500
• Total Program Fee: ₹1,08,000 ₹99,000

Exam Fee: Entirely covered in base tuition
Take advantage of our lowest No-Cost EMI option starting entirely at just ₹2,750/month (for 36 Months)!
programs.certifications: Augment your financial expertise seamlessly with unlimited access to premium finance/accounting certifications courtesy of integrated Coursera Plus.
usps: Specifically curated for students aiming for CA/CS setups concurrently
Complete free access to global financial certificates via Coursera
Dedicated placement assistance tapping diverse corporate sectors
Exceptionally accessible pricing via a structured ₹2,750/mo No-Cost EMI

programs.name: MBA
programs.eligibility: 10+2+3 year Bachelor's degree with a minimum of 50% marks (45% for reserved categories). Valid score in university entrance or established exams.
programs.about: The UGC-entitled Online MBA from Manipal University Jaipur (MUJ) provides learners with a rigorous and contemporary academic framework. Leveraging advanced LMS technologies, including Coursera access for enriched learning, MUJ creates leaders ready to conquer modern corporate challenges globally. Includes robust placement assistance.
programs.careerScope: Elevate your career trajectory as a management professional. Corporate domains heavily recruit UGC-recognized MBA graduates for mid to senior leadership positions, fast-tracking their strategic growth, compensation mapping, and organizational value proposition.

programs.name: MCA
programs.eligibility: BCA / B.Sc (Computer Science / IT) or equivalent degree with minimum 50% marks (45% for reserved categories). Candidates from non-IT backgrounds must have Mathematics at 10+2 level.
programs.about: The UGC-entitled Online Master of Computer Applications (MCA) at Manipal University Jaipur is designed to create tech-leaders of tomorrow. With access to advanced cloud labs, Google Cloud computing modules, and free Coursera certifications, this degree equips professionals with deep-tech proficiencies necessary for superior IT leadership.
programs.careerScope: An MCA radically shifts IT careers from foundational coding to architectural design and technology management. Graduates emerge as high-tier software architects, predictive analytics leaders, or cybersecurity specialists seamlessly fitting into global Fortune 500 tech teams.
programs.paymentDetails:
🔥 UGC-Entitled Online MCA!

• Semester Fee: ₹39,500
• Total Program Fee: ₹1,58,000

Exam Fee: Included in Semester Fee
Attractive easy-EMI options available to sponsor your tech upskilling effortlessly.
programs.certifications: Inclusive access to exhaustive technical certification tracks exclusively via Coursera, allowing candidates to specialize in Cloud, AI, and Big Data while completing standard degree modules.
usps: Strictly UGC-Entitled tech degree globally equivalent to an on-campus MCA
Google Cloud specific electives mapped directly into your learning flow
Free Coursera Plus access boosting your resume with industry-recognized tech certs
Placement assistance mapped to modern hiring profiles in MNCs
Access to e-library, proctored computer-based assessments, and live tech labs

programs.name: MSc Mathematics
programs.eligibility: BSc degree or a 10+2+3/4 years equivalent Bachelor’s degree with Mathematics as a compulsory subject from a recognized university.
programs.about: A 100% online UGC-entitled master's degree focusing on pure and applied mathematics. The curriculum covers advanced concepts such as linear algebra, differential equations, topology, and optimization techniques, bridging theoretical mathematics with its real-world applications.
programs.careerScope: Graduates thrive in high-demand analytical domains, stepping into roles like Data Scientist, Quantitative Analyst, Statistician, Cryptographer, or Operations Research Analyst across tech, finance, and academia.
programs.paymentDetails:
🔥 UGC-Entitled Online MSc!

• Semester Fee: ₹20,000
• Total Program Fee: ₹80,000

Exam Fee: Included in Semester Fee
Flexible No-Cost EMI options available.
programs.certifications: Students receive deeply integrated access to Bloomberg Market Concepts (BMC) certification to understand financial markets directly via the Bloomberg Terminal, alongside Coursera access.
usps: NAAC A+ accredited university offering a purely UGC-entitled degree
Exclusive access to the Coursera platform for in-demand skills
Build a global network with peers and alumni across industries
100% remote layout tailored for continuous global learners
